title: Malik's School Garden Through the Seasons
synopsis: Follow young Malik as he discovers how his school garden changes through all four seasons, learning about nature's beautiful cycle from spring planting to winter rest.

pages.text: Malik loves his school garden! In spring, everything wakes up. The trees grow tiny green leaves. Malik plants seeds in the soft, brown dirt.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes kneels in a school garden during spring, planting seeds. Pink cherry blossoms bloom on trees, green grass sprouts everywhere, and soft pastel colors fill the scene.
illustration.alt: Malik planting seeds in a spring garden with blooming trees

pages.text: Malik waters his seeds every day. 'Grow, little plants!' he says. Soon, green shoots peek up from the ground. The garden is full of life!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a small watering can, sprinkling water on tiny green sprouts. The same garden scene shows early spring growth with light green colors and morning dew.
illustration.alt: Malik watering small green sprouts in the garden

pages.text: Summer comes with bright sunshine! Malik's plants grow tall and strong. Red tomatoes hang like ornaments. Yellow sunflowers reach toward the sky.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes stands among tall summer plants in the same garden scene. Bright summer colors dominate - red tomatoes, yellow sunflowers, deep green leaves, and brilliant blue sky.
illustration.alt: Malik in a lush summer garden with tomatoes and sunflowers

pages.text: Malik picks juicy tomatoes with his teacher. 'We grew these!' he smiles. The summer garden gives them food to share with friends at snack time.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds red tomatoes in a basket alongside his teacher. The garden scene shows peak summer abundance with vibrant colors and full-grown vegetables.
illustration.alt: Malik and his teacher harvesting tomatoes from the garden

pages.text: Autumn paints the garden in warm colors. The leaves turn orange, red, and yellow. Malik helps rake the fallen leaves into big, crunchy piles.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes rakes autumn leaves in the same garden scene. Warm autumn colors dominate - orange, red, and golden yellow leaves falling from trees, with rich brown earth beneath.
illustration.alt: Malik raking colorful autumn leaves in the garden

pages.text: The pumpkins are big and round! Malik rolls one across the garden path. 'This one is as big as me!' he laughs. The autumn air feels cool and crisp.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes plays with a large orange pumpkin in the garden. The scene shows autumn's warm palette with pumpkins scattered among dried plants and colorful falling leaves.
illustration.alt: Malik playing with a large pumpkin in the autumn garden

pages.text: Winter brings snow to the garden. Everything looks different now! The plants sleep under a white blanket. Malik makes snow angels where his tomatoes grew.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes makes snow angels in the same garden scene, now covered in white snow. Cool winter colors dominate - white snow, gray sky, and bare brown tree branches creating a peaceful winter scene.
illustration.alt: Malik making snow angels in the snow-covered winter garden

pages.text: Even in winter, Malik loves his garden. He knows that under the snow, the seeds are resting. When spring comes again, new plants will grow. The garden never stops changing!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes stands peacefully in the winter garden scene. The illustration subtly shows all four seasons in corner vignettes - spring green, summer bright, autumn warm, winter cool - representing the complete cycle.
illustration.alt: Malik in the winter garden with small images showing all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Malik plant in the spring?
questions.explanation: Malik plants seeds in the soft, brown dirt during springtime!

questions.question: What color are the tomatoes in summer?
questions.explanation: The tomatoes are red and hang like ornaments in the summer garden!

questions.question: What does Malik rake in autumn?
questions.explanation: Malik rakes the fallen autumn leaves into big, crunchy piles!

questions.question: What covers the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: Snow covers the garden like a white blanket, and the plants sleep underneath!
